name: Yunfeng Financial Group Limited
summary: Yunfeng Financial Group Limited, an investment holding company, provides insurance products in Hong Kong and Macau. The company operates in two segments, Insurance Products, and Other Financial Services and Corporate. It provides life and medical insurance, annuities, pension, and mandatory provident fund schemes. The company also provides fund and asset management services, as well as financing and investing solutions; and corporate advisory, and securities placing and underwriting advisory services. In addition, it engages in the provision of employee stock ownership plan administration and principal investment. Further, the company provides administrative, trustee, and general services; agency services to non-life insurers; marketing and promoting products, and public relations services; Internet and multimedia systems, and application development services; and technological development of computer software and hardware, technical consulting, technology services, and database and computer network services. The company was formerly known as REORIENT GROUP LIMITED and changed its name to Yunfeng Financial Group Limited in October 2016. The company was incorporated in 1982 and is based in Central, Hong Kong. Yunfeng Financial Group Limited is a subsidiary of Yunfeng Financial Holdings Limited.
